criteria.description: Issues related to available features, playlists, lyrics, recommendations, content completeness, music/podcast availability, and audio listening quality.
criteria.name: Features, Content & Audio Experience
criteria.note: Candidate AHP/Fuzzy AHP criterion; requires expert judgement validation before final weighting.

criteria.description: Issues related to performance, stability, errors, crashes, loading, responsiveness, interface usability, navigation, and interaction flow.
criteria.name: App Reliability & Usability
criteria.note: Candidate AHP/Fuzzy AHP criterion; requires expert judgement validation before final weighting.

criteria.description: Issues related to advertisement frequency, interruption, placement, skipping, and perceived disruption in the listening experience.
criteria.name: Ads Experience
criteria.note: Candidate AHP/Fuzzy AHP criterion; requires expert judgement validation before final weighting.

criteria.description: Issues related to premium subscription, price, payment methods, billing, packages, and perceived value for money.
criteria.name: Subscription & Pricing
criteria.note: Candidate AHP/Fuzzy AHP criterion; requires expert judgement validation before final weighting.

criteria.description: Issues related to account access, login failures, password, email, verification, registration, and account state problems.
criteria.name: Account/Login
criteria.note: Candidate AHP/Fuzzy AHP criterion; requires expert judgement validation before final weighting.

note: These criteria are candidate criteria for AHP/Fuzzy AHP and still require expert judgement validation before final weighting.
